meta.siteTitle: Ponte. The bridge between buyer and seller.
meta.siteDescription: An invitation-led international trade network. Businesses are checked against company registers and sanctions lists, opportunities are reviewed by Ponte, and introductions are controlled, with identity disclosed only at the introduction stage. The Ponte Desk can manage a mandate on request. Operated by 1402 Celsius Ltd.
meta.ogDescription: Every published opportunity reviewed by Ponte. Businesses checked, introductions controlled. Submit an opportunity, or ask the Ponte Desk to manage a mandate.
meta.twitterDescription: An invitation-led international trade network: businesses checked, opportunities reviewed, introductions controlled.
